title: BLUELIGHT RAT: File Discovery from Browser Process
description: Detects recursive directory enumeration spawned by browser or script host processes. BLUELIGHT performs file and directory discovery to locate sensitive documents, credentials, and system files for later collection and exfiltration.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = 1 and ('Parent Process Name' like '*\\iexplore.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\wscript.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\powershell.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\mshta.exe')) and (('Command Line' like '*dir /s*' or 'Command Line' like '*dir /b*' or 'Command Line' like '*tree *' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ChildItem*' or 'Command Line' like '*-Recurse*' or 'Command Line' like '*ls -R*')))
falsepositives: System administrators using browser-based management tools
